title: glechoma andrica
intro: Glechoma andrica, also known as Creeping Thyme, is a low-growing, spreading herbaceous perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Glechoma andrica include reducing stress, improving respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, and it is also used as a culinary herb in Mediterranean cuisine.
